title: Sakana Fugu (Fully Tested - V/S Fable): UHM... REALLY?
summary: Sakana Fugu is a multi-agent orchestration system with a learned router that comes in two versions: Fugu and Fugu Ultra. It shows strong benchmark results on Terminal Bench, LiveCodeBench, and GPQA Diamond but underperforms Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and Humanity's Last Exam, with mixed results in practical coding and visual generation tasks.
writeup: The video tests Sakana Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system built around a learned router, available in two tiers: Fugu and Fugu Ultra. It benchmarks the system and compares it against Fable 5, showing strong results on Terminal Bench, LiveCodeBench, and GPQA Diamond, but weaker performance than Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and Humanity's Last Exam. Practical coding and visual generation tasks produced mixed outcomes, so the benchmark wins do not translate cleanly into hands-on use.
